---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist"
description: "Find upcoming hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs hosted by chen.ist Academy."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ev-page">

<!-- HERO — full-screen dark with atmospheric image -->
<div class="ev-hero">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image: url('/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Next Event</div>
    <h1>AI Ethics<br>Hackathon</h1>
    <div class="ev-hero-meta">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 5, 2026 &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest
    </div>
    <p>A weekend hackathon on ethical AI — bias detection, responsible design, and AI that puts people first.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="ev-btn">Register now</a>
      <a href="/academy/events/ical/ai-ethics-hackathon-2025.ics" class="ev-btn-ghost" download>Add to calendar</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING — dark image cards -->
<div class="ev-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Coming up</h2>
    <p class="sub">Spots are limited. Register early.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.jpg" alt="Summer School">
            <div class="ev-card-body">
              <h3>Summer School 2026</h3>
              <div class="ev-card-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Aug 1–15 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
              <p>Two weeks of cybersecurity, cloud, and AI.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-racks.jpg" alt="Makers Workshop">
            <div class="ev-card-body">
              <h3>Makers Workshop</h3>
              <div class="ev-card-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Sep 15 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest</div>
              <p>Hardware, DIY, and hands-on building.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-card">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="SpaceApps Challenge">
            <div class="ev-card-body">
              <h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3>
              <div class="ev-card-meta"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Oct 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
              <p>NASA's 48-hour global hackathon.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING -->
<div class="ev-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Every month</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular meetups you can count on.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Open discussion, hacking, and tech exploration.</p><div class="rec-when">Last Thursday</div><a href="https://clubul.computer/" class="ev-lk">Schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-mic"></i><h3>Tech Talks</h3><p>Industry experts on emerging tech and best practices.</p><div class="rec-when">First Tuesday</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ev-lk">Next talk</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="rec"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Workshops</h3><p>Coding sessions, open-source projects, collaborative learning.</p><div class="rec-when">See calendar</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="ev-lk">Join</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST EVENTS — dark thumbnail gallery -->
<div class="ev-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past events</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://marca-ro.ca/2024/11/23/conferinta-igiena-digitala-la-copii-are-loc-la-craiova/" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-past">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.jpg" alt="Cyber Hygiene for Kids">
            <div class="ev-past-body">
              <h4>Cyber Hygiene for Kids</h4>
              <div class="yr">Craiova · November 2024</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="ev-past">
          <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Capture the Flag">
          <div class="ev-past-body">
            <h4>Capture the Flag</h4>
            <div class="yr">Craiova · November 2023</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/p/sac" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="ev-past">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="SpaceApps Challenge">
            <div class="ev-past-body">
              <h4>SpaceApps · 9 Editions</h4>
              <div class="yr">Sweden & Romania · 2016–2024</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="ev-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ev-d"></div>
    <h2>Don't miss the next one</h2>
    <p>Get event updates or discuss hosting a private event for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="ev-btn">Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ev-lk" style="padding-top:0.85rem;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
